states.name: queued
states.description: Sync Run is durable and waits for eligible relationship/endpoints.

states.name: scanning
states.description: Start cursors and endpoint snapshots are frozen and changes are discovered.
entry_requirements: Non-expired start cursors or explicit rescan mode exist.

states.name: reconciling
states.description: Changes, identities, renames, deletes and policies are classified.

states.name: transferring
states.description: Required byte movements/metadata operations are executing through Transfer Runs.

states.name: verifying
states.description: Destination changes, conflicts and cursor advancement conditions are verified.
entry_requirements: Change results and destination read-back are available.

states.name: completed
states.description: Scoped accepted changes/conflicts are recorded and cursors advanced only for verified endpoint state.
entry_requirements: Verification and end cursors exist for accepted scope.

states.name: partial
states.description: Some scoped items succeeded while failures/conflicts/gaps remain explicitly retained.
entry_requirements: Partial outcomes and cursor non-advancement/limited advancement are explicit.

states.name: failed
states.description: Run terminally failed; start/end evidence, partial outputs and conflicts remain.
entry_requirements: Typed failure and reconciliation evidence exist.

states.name: cancelled
states.description: Run cancelled with partial work and cursor state reconciled.

required_preconditions: Endpoints/cursors are current or rescan mode is explicit.
Changes are authorized and conflicts are separated.
Required change results can be read back and cursor advancement evaluated.
Accepted destination state and end cursors are verified for declared scope.
Partial success/conflicts/failures and safe cursor advancement are explicit.
Partial work and cursor state are reconciled.
